Profile.Author: khordapp
Profile.Overview: Khord is a self-hosted music sharing platform. Share songs once — your followers listen on whichever streaming service they use (Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music, Deezer, and more). Setlists, voting, cross-platform links, Apple Music playlist import, and an owner admin panel all included. All data stored in a single SQLite database on your server.
Profile.Description: A single container. Set the Data Path, point a reverse proxy with a valid TLS certificate at port 3000, and set PUBLIC_APP_URL to your public HTTPS URL. Set OWNER_EMAILS to your email address so the first account you register gets admin access.
